# tech-trend-watch

> Long-term technology stack review using State of JS, State of CSS, and Thoughtworks Technology Radar — satisfaction×usage matrix, ADOPT/TRIAL/ASSESS/HOLD mapping, P0–P3 migration priority. Use for annual stack audits, planning major migrations (jest→vitest, webpack→Vite, etc.), or on-demand replacement decisions. Not for general architecture design.

## Install

```bash
apm install mizchi/skills/tooling/tech-trend-watch
```

For a reproducible setup, declare it in `apm.yml` instead:

```yaml
dependencies:
  apm:
    - mizchi/skills/tooling/tech-trend-watch
```

then run `apm install`.

See [SKILL.md](./SKILL.md) for what this skill does and when to use it.
<!-- apm:readme:end -->
